rows.label: qev050101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hmm... I recognize your face.
And from your bearing, I wager
you are quite the master.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0002
rows.name: ...Ah, I remember now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Could it be? Are you [ST:playername ], the one
who defeated Ga Derg-sama?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_JNK0010
rows.name: Acknowledge

rows.label: qev050101_SEL0011
rows.name:
Express surprise at the unexpected
praise and answer that he is correct.

rows.label: qev050101_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev050101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Stay wary of being suddenly recognized
and answer that he has the wrong person.

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0004
rows.name:
I knew it! My body may have
weakened with age, but it seems
my eyes have not failed me yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0005
rows.name:
This is perfect timing! It seems
I can entrust my wish to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0006
rows.name:
Ha ha ha ha! There is
no need for modesty![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0007
rows.name:
Striking down that mighty warrior has made you
quite the hot topic among the Lars, you know?
No one could easily forget that face of yours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0008
rows.name:
My name is Go Belg. I am retired now,
but back on our home world, I made
quite a name for myself as a warrior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0009
rows.name:
Now, I dedicate my time to
educating the next generation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0010
rows.name:
We Larsians are a people built upon the warrior's
path. No matter how impoverished we may become, we
cannot allow our blood and culture to die out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0011
rows.name:
I would like to formally request a favor
of you. Simply show me your strength.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0012
rows.name:
Once you have successfully completed my
request, I shall reward you with a secret
weapon and compensation. What do you say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0013
rows.name:
I have my thanks. Let us begin with a
little test. I would ask that you hunt
down a specific native creature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0014
rows.name:
It is a beast known as
the Welkin Luciola.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0015
rows.name:
I hear the Welkin Luciola can be
found in the Primordial Wilderness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0016
rows.name:
I am counting on you. I
shall wait for you here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0017
rows.name:
Your target is the Welkin Luciola.
Head to the Primordial Wilderness![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Still, the more I look at you, the
more marvelous your physique appears.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0019
rows.name:
The sheer vitality hidden within
your small frame... You must have
survived countless battlefields.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0020
rows.name:
The Welkin Luciola has
been defeated. Indeed...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0021
rows.name:
The Welkin Luciola closely
resembles the beast we Larsians
must strike down to come of age.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0022
rows.name:
It serves as the perfect opponent to
measure a warrior's true capabilities.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_JNK0110
rows.name: Boast

rows.label: qev050101_SEL0111
rows.name:
Puff your chest out and claim that
it wasn't a very tough opponent.

rows.label: qev050101_JNK0120
rows.name: Complain

rows.label: qev050101_SEL0121
rows.name:
Complain about the brutal
intensity of Larsian customs.

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0023
rows.name:
Ho... You certainly look the part, but
it seems you have the guts to match![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0024
rows.name:
I like you! I am half-tempted to make
you my third disciple on the spot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0025
rows.name:
But the fact remains that you defeated
it! It was a splendid display![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0026
rows.name:
Now for the main event. ...I would
have you challenge my disciples.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0027
rows.name:
They are two Larsian men named
Gi Ziordo and Gi Ziorde.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0028
rows.name:
They have a fair amount of talent for battle,
and when they fight together as a pair, they
exhibit truly unbelievable power, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0029
rows.name:
Lately, they have grown arrogant in that strength.
Claiming they don't need each other, they
scattered and are now training on their own.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0030
rows.name:
If this continues, they will lose
sight of what truly matters and end
up as nothing but mediocre warriors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Therefore... I want you to knock
some sense into them and correct
their misguided notions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0032
rows.name:
Gi Ziordo is at King's Falls
in the Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0033
rows.name:
Gi Ziorde is at the Second Anvil
Rock in the White Tree Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0034
rows.name:
I leave it in your hands...
I shall wait for you here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0035
rows.name:
Once, they encouraged each other like
true brothers, competing and pushing
themselves to greater heights...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0056
rows.name:
But somewhere along the line, they
forgot that spirit and began to drown
in their own individual strength.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0036
rows.name:
Gi Ziordo is at King's Falls
in the Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0037
rows.name:
Gi Ziorde is at the Second Anvil
Rock in the White Tree Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0038
rows.name:
I want you to use your strength
to correct their misguided
notions... I am counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0040
rows.name:
Oh, that took quite a bit of time!
I was growing tired of waiting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0041
rows.name:
How did it go? Were my disciples able to
land even a single blow against you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_JNK0030
rows.name: Boast

rows.label: qev050101_SEL0031
rows.name:
Put on a boastful attitude and puff
your chest out to show it was easy.

rows.label: qev050101_JNK0040
rows.name: Surrender

rows.label: qev050101_SEL0041
rows.name:
Put your hands up in surrender and say
they were so strong you had trouble.

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0042
rows.name:
So to you, my disciples were nothing more
than a light warm-up before breakfast![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0043
rows.name:
It seems my judgment of you was
correct. You have quite the mouth on
you. But I certainly do not hate it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0044
rows.name:
I see, I see! Fools they may be,
but they are my beloved disciples.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0045
rows.name:
Even a master like you should
have at least a little trouble
with them, or I'd be upset![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0046
rows.name:
...Yes. Defeat at your hands surely stripped
them of the delusion that they could master the
warrior's path without each other's support.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0047
rows.name:
In order to reassess themselves, they
returned to me. So, I sent them to the
Arms Performance Testing Ground in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0048
rows.name:
Having seen each other's faces for the
first time in a while, they should have
regained the bond they once shared.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0049
rows.name:
...Which brings me to my final request.
I would ask that you cross blades
with my disciples one more time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0050
rows.name:
But this time, it won't be a
one-on-one... You will face the
two of them fighting as a pair![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0051
rows.name:
Go and test if the bond between my
disciples is genuine. With your strength,
you should be more than capable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0072
rows.name:
Gi Ziordo and Gi Ziorde... When
those two join forces, their
power multiplies tenfold...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0073
rows.name:
Please, see with your own eyes
if the strength of my disciples'
bond has been reawakened![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0074
rows.name:
Oh! You have returned! Judging from your
appearance... it was a fierce battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0075
rows.name:
How did it go? Did my disciples trust
in one another and draw out power
that exceeded their own limits?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050101_SEL0051
rows.name:
Say that fighting as a pair, they
were like entirely different people.

rows.label: qev050101_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev050101_SEL0061
rows.name:
Say that they are still
far too inexperienced.

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0052
rows.name:
If a warrior of your caliber says
so, then there can be no mistake![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0053
rows.name:
From your perspective, I suppose it would look
that way! However, when they returned, the
stagnation had completely vanished from their eyes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0054
rows.name:
Heh. It seems my disciples have
set out on a journey of martial
training together this time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0055
rows.name:
They will not stray from the path
again. They will hone each other's
skills and grow tremendously.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0058
rows.name:
Thank you for using your
strength to guide my disciples![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050101_MSG0057
rows.name:
This is a small token of gratitude from
an inadequate master. Please, accept it![ST:wait ]
